---
title: ""
page-layout: article
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
# Laura Burnett

[Systems neuroscience, PhD.<br><br>I like thinking about how to present and share complex data]{.subtitle}

::: {.bio}
[Hi! 👋 I'm Laura - I'm a neuroscience research scientist. I've investigated [rapid, visually-driven decision making](https://journals.plos.org/plosbiology/article?id=10.1371/journal.pbio.3002668) in mice, helped develop a [fruit fly visual system connectome](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08746-0) and package the information into an [interactive web resource](https://reiserlab.github.io/celltype-explorer-drosophila-male-cns/index.html) for browsing the data.]{.bio-text}
:::
:::

```{=html}
<canvas id="disco-canvas" style="position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;display:none;"></canvas>
<button id="disco-btn" aria-label="Toggle disco ball">🪩</button>

<script>
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('disco-canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const btn = document.getElementById('disco-btn');

  let active = false;
  let animId = null;
  let t = 0;
  let dropT = 0;
  let retracting = false;
  let retractStartY = 0;
  let retractT = 0;

  // ─── Config ───
  const BALL_RADIUS = 65;
  const ROWS = 28;
  const STRING_WIDTH = 1.5;

  // ─── Lights ───
  const lights = [
    { x: 0.4, y: -0.6, z: 0.7, color: [255, 250, 240], intensity: 1.0 },
    { x: -0.5, y: -0.3, z: 0.6, color: [220, 230, 255], intensity: 0.5 },
    { x: 0.0, y: 0.4, z: 0.8, color: [255, 240, 230], intensity: 0.3 },
  ];
  for (const l of lights) {
    const len = Math.sqrt(l.x * l.x + l.y * l.y + l.z * l.z);
    l.x /= len; l.y /= len; l.z /= len;
  }

  // ─── Build sphere facets ───
  const facets = [];
  for (let row = 0; row < ROWS; row++) {
    const phi1 = (row / ROWS) * Math.PI;
    const phi2 = ((row + 1) / ROWS) * Math.PI;
    const y1 = Math.cos(phi1), y2 = Math.cos(phi2);
    const r1 = Math.sin(phi1), r2 = Math.sin(phi2);
    const midSin = Math.sin((phi1 + phi2) / 2);
    const cols = Math.max(6, Math.round(midSin * 40));

    for (let col = 0; col < cols; col++) {
      const t1 = (col / cols) * Math.PI * 2;
      const t2 = ((col + 1) / cols) * Math.PI * 2;
      const tm = (t1 + t2) / 2;
      const rm = (r1 + r2) / 2;
      const nx = Math.cos(tm) * rm;
      const ny = (y1 + y2) / 2;
      const nz = Math.sin(tm) * rm;
      const nLen = Math.sqrt(nx * nx + ny * ny + nz * nz);
      const perturb = 0.09;
      const px = (Math.random() - 0.5) * perturb;
      const py = (Math.random() - 0.5) * perturb;
      const pz = (Math.random() - 0.5) * perturb;

      facets.push({
        corners: [
          { x: Math.cos(t1) * r1, y: y1, z: Math.sin(t1) * r1 },
          { x: Math.cos(t2) * r1, y: y1, z: Math.sin(t2) * r1 },
          { x: Math.cos(t2) * r2, y: y2, z: Math.sin(t2) * r2 },
          { x: Math.cos(t1) * r2, y: y2, z: Math.sin(t1) * r2 },
        ],
        inset: 0.93,
        cx: nx, cy: ny, cz: nz,
        pnx: nx / nLen + px, pny: ny / nLen + py, pnz: nz / nLen + pz,
        tintR: 0.92 + Math.random() * 0.16,
        tintG: 0.92 + Math.random() * 0.16,
        tintB: 0.94 + Math.random() * 0.12,
      });
    }
  }

  // ─── Colorful speckles ───
  const speckleAnchors = [];
  const RINGS = 7;
  const BASE_PER_RING = 6;
  for (let ring = 1; ring <= RINGS; ring++) {
    const count = BASE_PER_RING + ring * 3;
    const ringDist = ring / RINGS;
    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
      const angle = (i / count) * Math.PI * 2 + (ring % 2) * (Math.PI / count);
      speckleAnchors.push({
        angle,
        dist: ringDist * (0.93 + Math.random() * 0.14),
        size: 1.5 + Math.random() * 4,
        brightness: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7,
        phaseOffset: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
        hue: Math.random() * 360,
      });
    }
  }

  // ─── Helpers ───
  function rotY(x, y, z, a) {
    const c = Math.cos(a), s = Math.sin(a);
    return { x: x * c + z * s, y, z: -x * s + z * c };
  }
  function insetPoint(px, py, cx, cy, factor) {
    return { x: cx + (px - cx) * factor, y: cy + (py - cy) * factor };
  }

  function resize() {
    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  // ─── Ball position ───
  function getBallX() { return canvas.width - 120; }
  function getTargetY() { return canvas.height * 0.24; }

  // ─── Spring drop: gentle bounce ───
  function getDropY(elapsed) {
    const target = getTargetY();
    const startOff = -200;
    const amp = target - startOff;
    if (elapsed > 4) return target;
    const spring = amp * Math.exp(-2.5 * elapsed) * Math.cos(4 * elapsed);
    return target - spring;
  }

  // ─── Retract: ease-out slide up ───
  function getRetractY(elapsed) {
    const duration = 1.5;
    const progress = Math.min(1, elapsed / duration);
    const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
    const offScreen = -(BALL_RADIUS + Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.5 + 100);
    return retractStartY + (offScreen - retractStartY) * ease;
  }

  // ─── Main draw ───
  function draw() {
    t += 0.005;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const isDark = document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');

    // Auto-retract if user switches to light mode while ball is active
    if (!isDark && active && !retracting) {
      beginRetract();
    }

    const ballX = getBallX();
    let ballY;

    if (retracting) {
      retractT += 1 / 60;
      ballY = getRetractY(retractT);
      const offScreen = -(BALL_RADIUS + Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.5 + 100);
      if (ballY <= offScreen + 1) {
        stopDisco();
        return;
      }
    } else {
      dropT += 1 / 60;
      ballY = getDropY(dropT);
    }

    const rotAngle = t;

    // ── String ──
    ctx.save();
    ctx.strokeStyle = isDark ? '#555' : '#999';
    ctx.lineWidth = STRING_WIDTH;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(ballX, 0);
    ctx.lineTo(ballX, ballY - BALL_RADIUS + 2);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.restore();

    // ── Speckles ──
    const maxSpread = Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.42;
    const groupRot = t * 0.6;

    for (const sp of speckleAnchors) {
      const a = sp.angle + groupRot;
      const d = sp.dist * maxSpread;
      const sx = ballX + Math.cos(a) * d;
      const sy = ballY + Math.sin(a) * d * 0.9;

      const pulse = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(t * 2.5 + sp.phaseOffset);
      const alpha = sp.brightness * (0.15 + 0.85 * pulse);
      const r = sp.size * (0.7 + 0.3 * pulse);
      const lightness = isDark ? '75%' : '60%';
      const sat = isDark ? '80%' : '70%';

      // Soft glow
      const glow = ctx.createRadialGradient(sx, sy, 0, sx, sy, r * 4);
      glow.addColorStop(0, 'hsla(' + sp.hue + ',' + sat + ',' + lightness + ',' + (alpha * 0.3) + ')');
      glow.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = glow;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx, sy, r * 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();

      // Core
      const core = ctx.createRadialGradient(sx, sy, 0, sx, sy, r);
      core.addColorStop(0, 'hsla(' + sp.hue + ',' + sat + ',' + lightness + ',' + alpha + ')');
      core.addColorStop(0.5, 'hsla(' + sp.hue + ',' + sat + ',' + lightness + ',' + (alpha * 0.5) + ')');
      core.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = core;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(sx, sy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }

    // ── Disco Ball ──
    const gapColor = isDark ? 'rgb(35, 35, 40)' : 'rgb(20, 20, 24)';
    const ambientBase = isDark ? 75 : 65;

    const transformed = facets.map(function(f) {
      const rc = rotY(f.cx, f.cy, f.cz, rotAngle);
      const rn = rotY(f.pnx, f.pny, f.pnz, rotAngle);
      const pts = f.corners.map(function(c) {
        const p = rotY(c.x, c.y, c.z, rotAngle);
        return { x: ballX + p.x * BALL_RADIUS, y: ballY + p.y * BALL_RADIUS, z: p.z };
      });
      return { pts: pts, z: rc.z, nx: rn.x, ny: rn.y, nz: rn.z, tintR: f.tintR, tintG: f.tintG, tintB: f.tintB, inset: f.inset };
    });

    transformed.sort(function(a, b) { return a.z - b.z; });

    for (const f of transformed) {
      if (f.nz < -0.02) continue;

      let centX = 0, centY = 0;
      for (const p of f.pts) { centX += p.x; centY += p.y; }
      centX /= f.pts.length;
      centY /= f.pts.length;

      const inPts = f.pts.map(function(p) { return insetPoint(p.x, p.y, centX, centY, f.inset); });

      let totalR = ambientBase, totalG = ambientBase, totalB = ambientBase + 3;
      let maxSpec = 0;

      for (const l of lights) {
        const dot = f.nx * l.x + f.ny * l.y + f.nz * l.z;
        const diffuse = Math.max(0, dot);
        const spec = Math.pow(Math.max(0, dot), 40) * l.intensity;
        maxSpec = Math.max(maxSpec, spec);
        const fresnel = 1.0 - Math.abs(f.nz);
        const fresnelBoost = 0.3 + 0.7 * Math.pow(fresnel, 2);
        const contribution = (diffuse * 0.75 + spec * 1.5) * l.intensity * fresnelBoost;
        totalR += l.color[0] * contribution * f.tintR;
        totalG += l.color[1] * contribution * f.tintG;
        totalB += l.color[2] * contribution * f.tintB;
      }

      const rv = Math.min(255, totalR) | 0;
      const gv = Math.min(255, totalG) | 0;
      const bv = Math.min(255, totalB) | 0;

      // Gap
      ctx.fillStyle = gapColor;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(f.pts[0].x, f.pts[0].y);
      for (let i = 1; i < f.pts.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(f.pts[i].x, f.pts[i].y);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fill();

      // Tile
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + rv + ',' + gv + ',' + bv + ')';
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(inPts[0].x, inPts[0].y);
      for (let i = 1; i < inPts.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(inPts[i].x, inPts[i].y);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fill();

      // Flash
      if (maxSpec > 0.4) {
        const flashAlpha = Math.min(1, (maxSpec - 0.4) * 2.5);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, ' + (flashAlpha * 0.8) + ')';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inPts[0].x, inPts[0].y);
        for (let i = 1; i < inPts.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(inPts[i].x, inPts[i].y);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
      }

      // Bevel
      if (f.nz > 0.1) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,' + (0.06 + maxSpec * 0.15) + ')';
        ctx.lineWidth = 0.4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inPts[0].x, inPts[0].y);
        ctx.lineTo(inPts[1].x, inPts[1].y);
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }

    // ── Sheen ──
    const sheenX = ballX - BALL_RADIUS * 0.2;
    const sheenY = ballY - BALL_RADIUS * 0.25;
    const sheen = ctx.createRadialGradient(sheenX, sheenY, 0, ballX, ballY, BALL_RADIUS);
    sheen.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)');
    sheen.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)');
    sheen.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = sheen;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(ballX, ballY, BALL_RADIUS, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    // ── Rim light ──
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';
    const rim = ctx.createRadialGradient(ballX, ballY, BALL_RADIUS * 0.85, ballX, ballY, BALL_RADIUS * 1.05);
    rim.addColorStop(0, 'transparent');
    rim.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(180, 200, 220, 0.04)');
    rim.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(180, 200, 220, 0.08)');
    ctx.fillStyle = rim;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(ballX, ballY, BALL_RADIUS * 1.05, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();

    animId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }

  // ─── Toggle ───
  function startDisco() {
    active = true;
    retracting = false;
    dropT = 0;
    t = 0;
    resize();
    canvas.style.display = 'block';
    animId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }

  function beginRetract() {
    retracting = true;
    retractStartY = getDropY(dropT);
    retractT = 0;
  }

  function stopDisco() {
    active = false;
    retracting = false;
    if (animId) { cancelAnimationFrame(animId); animId = null; }
    canvas.style.display = 'none';
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  }

  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (!active) {
      startDisco();
    } else {
      beginRetract();
    }
  });
})();
</script>
```
